items.title: Amazon appears to be down, it’s not just you
items.summary:
It’s not just you, Amazon appears to be down. At this point it seems like just the store is actually down, but it’s hard to say for sure. We started to see some oddities on listings over the last few hours and now it looks like most of its Gold Box page and many of the actual listings pages are either not loading properly or Amazon is in the middle of some kind of visual overhaul. 

more…

items.title: Get the upgraded 1,536Wh Jackery Explorer v2 portable power station with $500 exclusive savings to a new $499 low
items.summary:
We’ve secured an exclusive chance from Wellbots to score the best price to date on the Jackery Explorer 1500 v2 Portable Power Station at $499 shipped, after using the exclusive code JACK9TO5DEAL at checkout for $100 off. This second-generation model hit the scene back in November at $999, with discounts having seen the costs taken down to $799 and $699 during sales in the closing months of 2025, before the newer Explorer 1500 Ultra power station debuted at CES 2026 and began stealing its featured thunder during events in 2026. Not only is it already starting $100 under the previous low, but with the exclusive extra $100 savings (giving you a total $500 savings) the price is dropping even lower to mark a new all-time low price for our readers.

more…

items.title: It’s official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk

items.title: United Airlines can permanently ban passengers who don’t wear headphones
